name: agent-swarm-local
description: Hybrid LLM routing: local Ollama models via WebLLM/WebGPU (persistent, zero-cost) for orchestrator and simple tasks, OpenRouter for complex tasks. Best of both worlds: zero-cost local processing + cloud power when needed.
author: Austin

config.openrouter_api_key: Required: OpenRouter API key must be configured in OpenClaw platform settings for complex tasks
config.webgpu_daemon: Required: WebGPU daemon must be running with persistent models (Llama 3.2, Mistral, CodeLlama)
config.openclaw_json: Reads tools.exec.host and tools.exec.node from openclaw.json (located via OPENCLAW_HOME or ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)
